stemHtml: Which of these statements is correct regarding the number of antennas required for a radio altimeter?

options.a: One antenna transmitting and receiving at the same time.
options.b: Two antennas are used to generate a stronger signal.
options.c: Two antennas, one for transmission and one for reception, sufficiently spaced to avoid interference.
options.d: A single antenna which is also used by the EGPWS.
